line: That’s absurd. No such power exists in the world. This...Necromancer is nothing more than a mortal man. A conjurer dabbling in black magic.

name: Gandalf
line: And so I thought too. But, Radagast has seen

name: Saruman
line: Radagast? Do not speak to me about Radagast the Brown. He is a foolish fellow.

name: Gandalf
line: Well, he’s odd, I grant you. He lives a solitary life.

name: Saruman
line: It’s not that. It’s his excessive consumption of mushrooms. They’ve addled his brain and yellowed his teeth. I warned him, it is unbefitting of the Istari to be wander in the woods...

name: telepathically
line: You carry something. It came to you from Radagast. He found it in Dol

name: telepathically
line: Yes.

name: telepathically
line: Show me.

name: Saruman
line: …or I’d think I was talking to myself…

name: Elrond
line: What is that?

name: Galadriel
line: A relic of Mordor.

name: Elrond
line: A Morgul blade.

name: Galadriel
line: Made for the Witchking of Angmar, and buried with him. When Angmar fell, men of the North took his body and all that he possessed and sealed it within the HighFells of Rhudaur. Deep within the rock they buried them, in a tomb so dark it would never come to light.

name: Elrond
line: This is not possible. A powerful spells lies upon those tombs; they cannot be opened.

name: Saruman
line: What proof do we have this weapon came from Angmar’s grave?

name: Gandalf
line: I have none.

name: Saruman
line: Because there is none. Let us examine what we know. A single Orc pack has dared to cross the Bruinen. A dagger from a bygone age has been found. And a human sorcerer, who calls himself the Necromancer, has taken up residence in a ruined fortress. It’s not so very much, after all. The question of this dwarvish company, however, troubles me deeply. I’m not convinced, Gandalf; I do not feel I can condone such a quest. If they’d come to me, I might have spared them this disappointment. I do not pretend to understand your reasons for raising their hopes…

name: telepathically
line: They are leaving.

name: telepathically
line: Yes.

name: telepathically
line: You knew.

name: Saruman
line: …I am afraid there is nothing else for it.

name: Lindir
line: My Lord Elrond; the dwarves, they’ve gone.

name: Thorin
line: Be on your guard; we’re about to step over the edge of the Wild. Balin, you know these

name: Balin
line: Aye.

name: Thorin
line: Master Baggins, I suggest you keep up.

name: Galadriel
line: You will follow them?

name: Gandalf
line: Yes.

name: Galadriel
line: You are right to help Thorin Oakenshield. But I fear this quest has set in motion forces we do not yet understand. The riddle of the Morgul blade must be answered. Something moves in the shadows, unseen, hidden from our sight. It will not show itself, not yet. But every day it grows in strength. You must be careful.

name: Gandalf
line: Yes.

name: Galadriel
line: Mithrandir? Why the Halfling?

name: Gandalf
line: I don’t know. Saruman believes that it is only great power that can hold evil in check. But that is not what I have found. I’ve found it is the small things, everyday deeds of ordinary folk, that keeps the darkness at bay. Simple acts of kindness and love. Why Bilbo Baggins? Perhaps it is because I am afraid, and he gives me courage.

name: telepathically
line: Do not be afraid, Mithrandir.

name: aloud
line: You are not alone.

name: Galadriel
line: Ae boe i le eliathon, im tulithon. [subtitle: If you should ever need my help, I will come.]

name: Thorin
line: Hold on!

name: Thorin
line: We must find shelter!

name: Dwalin
line: Watch out!

name: Balin
line: This is no thunderstorm; it’s a thunder battle! Look!

name: Bofur
line: Well bless me, the legends are true. Giants; Stone Giants!

name: Thorin
line: Take cover: you’ll fall!

name: Kili
line: What’s happening?

name: Fili
line: Kili! Grab my hand! Ki...

name: Thorin
line: No! No! Kili!

name: Balin
line: We’re all right! We’re alive!

name: Bofur
line: Where’s Bilbo? Where’s the Hobbit?

name: Ori
line: There!

name: Dwalin
line: Get him!

name: Dwalin
line: I thought we’d lost our burglar.

name: Thorin
line: He’s been lost ever since he left home. He should never have come. He has no place

name: Dwalin
line: It looks safe enough.

name: Thorin
line: Search to the back; caves in mountains are seldom unoccupied.

name: Dwalin
line: There’s nothing here.

name: Gloin
line: Right then! Let’s get a fire started.

name: Thorin
line: No, No fires, not in this place. Get some sleep. We start at first light.

name: Balin
line: We were to wait in the mountains until Gandalf joined us. That was the plan.

name: Thorin
line: Plans change. Bofur, take the first watch.

name: Azog
line: [subtitle: The scent is fresh! They have taken the mountain pass.]

name: Bofur
line: Where do you think you’re going?

name: Bilbo
line: Back to Rivendell.

name: Bofur
line: No, no, you can’t turn back now, you’re part of the Company. You’re one of us.

name: Bilbo
line: I’m not though, am I? Thorin said I should never have come, and he was right. I’m not a Took, I’m a Baggins, I don’t know what I was thinking. I should never have run out my door.

name: Bofur
line: You’re homesick; I understand.

name: Bilbo
line: No, you don’t, you don’t understand! None of you do you’re dwarves. You used to to

name: Bilbo
line: I am sorry, I didn’t...

name: Bofur
line: No, you’re right. We don’t belong anywhere. I wish you all the luck in the world. I really do.

name: Bofur
line: What’s that?

name: Thorin
line: Wake up. Wake up!

name: Great Goblin
line: Who would be so bold as to come armed into my kingdom? Spies? Thieves?

name: Grinnah
line: Dwarves, Your Malevolence.

name: Great Goblin
line: Dwarves?

name: Grinnah
line: We found them on the front porch.

name: Great Goblin
line: Well, don’t just stand there; search them! Every crack, every crevice.

name: Great Goblin
line: What are you doing in these parts? Speak!

name: Great Goblin
line: Well then, if they will not talk, we’ll make them squawk! Bring out the Mangler! Bring out the Bone Breaker! Start with the youngest.

name: Thorin
line: Wait.

name: Great Goblin
line: Well, well, well, look who it is. Thorin son of Thrain, son of Thror; King under the

name: Great Goblin
line: Oh, but I’m forgetting, you don’t have a mountain. And you’re not a king. Which makes you nobody, really. I know someone who would pay a pretty price for your head. Just the head, nothing attached. Perhaps you know of whom I speak, an old enemy of yours. A Pale Orc astride a White Warg.

name: Thorin
line: Azog the Defiler was destroyed. He was slain in battle long ago.

name: Great Goblin
line: So you think his defiling days are done, do you?

name: Great Goblin
line: Send word to the Pale Orc; tell him I have found his prize.

name: Gollum
line: Yes. Yes. Yes! Yes! Gollum. Gollum.

name: Gollum
line: Nasty goblinses. Better than old bones, Precious; better than nothing.

name: Smeagol
line: Too many boneses, Precious! Nothing of flesh!

name: Gollum
line: Shut up! Get its skin off. Start with its head.

name: singing
line: The cold hard lands, they bites our hands, they gnaws our feet. The rocks and stones, they’re like old bones, all bare of meat. Cold as death, they have no breath, it’s good to eat!

name: Gollum
line: Bless us and splash us, Precious! That’s a meaty mouthful.

name: Gollum
line: Aaahh. Gollum. Gollum. Ack

name: Bilbo
line: Back. Stay back. I’m warning you, don’t come any closer.

name: Gollum
line: It’s got an elfish blade, but it’s not an Elfs. Not an Elfs, no. What is it, Precious? What is it?

name: Bilbo
line: My name is Bilbo Baggins.

name: Gollum
line: Bagginses? What is a Bagginses, Precious?

name: Bilbo
line: I’m a Hobbit from the Shire.

name: Gollum
line: Oh! We like Goblinses, batses, and fishes, but we hasn’t tried Hobbitses before. Is it soft? Is it juicy?

name: Bilbo
line: Now, now, K--keep your distance! I’ll use this if I have to!

name: Bilbo
line: I don’t want any trouble, do you understand? Just show me the way to get out of here, and I’ll be on my way.

name: Gollum
line: Why, is it lost?

name: Bilbo
line: Yes, yes, and I want to get unlost as soon as possible.

name: Gollum
line: Ooh! We knows! We knows safe paths for Hobbitses. Safe paths in the dark.

name: Gollum
line: Shut up.

name: Bilbo
line: I didn’t say anything.

name: Gollum
line: Wasn’t talking to you.

name: Gollum
line: But yes, we was, Precious, we was.

name: Bilbo
line: Look, uh, I don’t know what your game is, but I

name: Gollum
line: Games? We love games, doesn’t we, Precious? Does it like games? Does it? Does it? Does it like to play?

name: Bilbo
line: Maybe?

name: Gollum
line: What has roots as nobody sees, is taller than trees. Up, up, up it goes, and yet, never

name: Bilbo
line: ...The mountain.

name: Gollum
line: Yess, yess, oh, let’s have another one, eh? Yes, come on, do it again, do it—do it again. Ask us.

name: Gollum
line: No! No more riddles. Finish him off. Finish him now. Gollum! Gollum!

name: Bilbo
line: No! No, no, no. I wa—I want to play. I do. I want to play. I can see you are very good at this. S—so why don’t we have a game of riddles? Yes, just, just you and me.

name: Gollum
line: Yes! Yes, just, just—just us.

name: Bilbo
line: Yes. Yes. And—and if I win, you show me the way out.

name: Gollum
line: Yes. Yes

name: Gollum
line: And if it loses? What then?

name: Gollum
line: Well, if it loses, Precious, we will eats it!

name: Gollum
line: If Baggins loses, we eats it whole.

name: Bilbo
line: Fair enough.

name: Gollum
line: Well, Baggins first.

name: Bilbo
line: Thirty white horses on a red hill. First they champ, then they stamp, then they stand still.

name: Gollum
line: Teeth?

name: Gollum
line: Teeth!! Yes, my Precious. But we—we—we only have nine.

name: Gollum
line: Our turn. Voiceless it cries, wingless flutters, toothless bites, mouthless mutters.

name: Bilbo
line: Just a minute.

name: Gollum
line: Oh, oh! We knows. We knows!

name: Gollum
line: Shut up.

name: Bilbo
line: Wind. It’s wind! Of course it is.

name: Gollum
line: Very clever, Hobbitses, very clever.

name: Bilbo
line: Ah, ah, ah, ah. A—a box without hinges, key, o—or, or lid; yet golden treasure inside is hid.

name: Gollum
line: A box...and a lid...and then a key....

name: Bilbo
line: Well?

name: Gollum
line: It’s nasty. Uh, box, uh...

name: Bilbo
line: Give up?

name: Gollum
line: Give us a chance, Precious, give us a chance!

name: Gollum
line: Eggses! Eggses! [He laughs.] What crunchy little eggses, yes. Grandmother taught us to suck them, yes.

name: Gollum
line: Ahh. We have one for you: All things it devours, birds, beasts, trees, flowers. Gnaws iron, bites steel, grinds hard stones to meal. Answer us.

name: Bilbo
line: Give me a moment, please, I gave you a good long while.

name: Bilbo
line: I don’t know this one.

name: Gollum
line: Is it tasty? Is it scrumptious? Is it crunchable?

name: Bilbo
line: Let me think. Let me think.

name: Gollum
line: It’s stuck. Bagginses is stuck.

name: Gollum
line: Time’s up.

name: Bilbo
line: Time. Ti—the answer is time.

name: Bilbo
line: Actually, it wasn’t that hard.

name: Gollum
line: Last question. Last chance.

name: Bilbo
line: Ah, uh....

name: Gollum
line: Ask us. ASK US!!

name: Bilbo
line: Yes, yes, alright.

name: Bilbo
line: What have I got in my pocket?

name: Gollum
line: That’s not fair. It’s not fair! It’s against the rules!

name: Gollum
line: Ask us another one.

name: Bilbo
line: No, no, no, no. You said ‘Ask me a question.’ Well, that is my question. What have I got in my pocket?

name: Gollum
line: Three guesses, Precious. It must give us three.

name: Bilbo
line: Three guesses. Very well, guess away.

name: Gollum
line: Handses!

name: Bilbo
line: Wrong, guess again.

name: Gollum
line: Fishbones, goblins’ teeth, wet shells, bat’s wings ... Knife!

name: Gollum
line: Oh, shut up.

name: Bilbo
line: Wrong again. Last guess.

name: Gollum
line: String!

name: Gollum
line: Or nothing.

name: Bilbo
line: Two guesses at once; wrong both times.

name: Bilbo
line: So, come then, I won the game, you promised to show me the way out.

name: Gollum
line: Did we say so, Precious? Did we say so?

name: Gollum
line: What has it got in its pocketses?

name: Bilbo
line: That’s no concern of yours. You lost.

name: Gollum
line: Lost? Lost? Lost?

name: Gollum
line: Where is it? Where is it? No! Ahh! Where is it? No! No!!!

name: Gollum
line: Lost! Curses and splashes, my precious is lost!

name: Bilbo
line: What have you lost?

name: Gollum
line: Mustn't ask us! Not its business! No! Gollum, Gollum.

name: Gollum
line: What has it got in its nasty little pocketses?

name: Gollum
line: He stole it. He stole it! Ahh! HE STOLE IT!

name: Great Goblin
line: Bones will be shattered, necks will be wrung! You’ll be beaten and battered, from

name: Great Goblin
line: I know that sword! It is the GoblinCleaver, the Biter, the blade that sliced a thousand necks.

name: Great Goblin
line: Slash them! Beat them! Kill them! Kill them all! Cut off his head!

name: Gandalf
line: Take up arms. Fight. Fight!

name: Great Goblin
line: He wields the FoeHammer, the Beater, bright as daylight!

name: Dwarf
line: Nori!

name: Gandalf
line: Follow me. Quick! Run!

name: Gollum
line: Give it to us!

name: Gollum
line: It’s ours. It’s ours!

name: Gollum
line: Thief! Baggins!

name: Gandalf
line: Quickly!

name: A dwarf
line: Faster!

name: Dwalin
line: Post!

name: Dwalin
line: Charge!

name: Thorin
line: Cut the ropes!

name: Gandalf
line: Quickly!

name: Thorin
line: Jump!

name: Great Goblin
line: You thought you could escape me?

name: Great Goblin
line: What are you going to do now, wizard?

name: Great Goblin
line: Ow, ow, ow!

name: Great Goblin
line: That’ll do it.

name: Bofur
line: Well, that could have been worse.

name: Dwalin
line: You’ve got to be joking!

name: Kili
line: Gandalf!

name: Dwalin
line: There’s too many! We can’t fight them.

name: Gandalf
line: Only one thing will save us: daylight! Come on! Here, on your feet!

name: Gollum
line: Wait, my Precious! Wait! Gollum, Gollum.

name: Gollum
line: Baggins! Thief! Curse it and crush it, we hates it forever!

name: Gandalf
line: Five, six, seven, eight...Bifur, Bofur...that’s ten...Fili, Kili...that’s twelve...and Bombur that makes thirteen. Where’s Bilbo? Where is our Hobbit? Where is our hobbit?!

name: Dwalin
line: Curse the halfling! Now he’s lost?!

name: Gloin
line: I thought he was with Dori!

name: Dori
line: Don’t blame me!

name: Gandalf
line: Well, where did you last see him?

name: Nori
line: I think I saw him slip away, when they first collared us.

name: Gandalf
line: What happened exactly? Tell me!

name: Thorin
line: I’ll tell you what happened. Master Baggins saw his chance and he took it! He’s thought of nothing but his soft bed and his warm hearth since first he stepped out of his door! We will not be seeing our Hobbit again. He is long gone.

name: Bilbo
line: No, he isn’t.

name: Gandalf
line: Bilbo Baggins! I’ve never been so glad to see anyone in my life!

name: Kili
line: Bilbo, we’d given you up!

name: Fili
line: How on earth did you get past the Goblins?!

name: Dwalin
line: How, indeed.

name: Gandalf
line: Well, what does it matter? He’s back!

name: Thorin
line: It matters! I want to know: why did you come back?

name: Bilbo
line: Look, I know you doubt me, I know you always have. And you’re right, I often think of Bag End. I miss my books. And my armchair. And my garden. See, that’s where I belong. That’s home. And that’s why I came back, cause you don’t have one. A home. It was taken from you. But I will help you take it back if I can.

name: Azog
line: [subtitle: Run them down! Tear them to pieces!]

name: Thorin
line: Out of the frying pan...

name: Gandalf
line: ...and into the fire! Run! RUN!

name: Gandalf
line: Up into the trees, all of you! Come on, climb! Bilbo, climb!

name: Thorin
line: They’re coming!

name: Thorin
line: Azog?!

name: Azog
line: Nuzdigid? Nuzdi gast? [subtitle: Do you smell it? The scent of fear?] Ganziligi unarug obod nauzdanish, Torin undag Trainob.

name: Thorin
line: It cannot be.

name: Azog
line: Kod, Toragid biriz. [subtitle: That one is mine.] Wororida! [subtitle: Kill the others!]

name: Azog
line: Sho gad adol! [subtitle: Drink their blood!]

name: Gandalf
line: Fili!

name: Ori
line: Aahhh! Oh! Oh no!

name: Dori
line: Mister Gandalf!

name: Dori
line: Hold on, Ori!

name: Ori
line: Help!

name: Balin
line: Nooo!

name: Dwalin
line: Thorin! Nooo!

name: Azog
line: Biriz torag khobdudol. [subtitle: Bring me the Dwarf’s head.]

name: Azog
line: [subtitle: Kill him.]

name: Fili
line: Thorin!

name: Gandalf
line: Thorin! Thorin.

name: Thorin
line: The halfling?

name: Gandalf
line: It’s all right. Bilbo is here. He’s quiet safe.

name: Thorin
line: You! What were you doing? You nearly got yourself killed! Did I not say that you would be a burden? That you would not survive in the wild and that you had no place amongst us?

name: Thorin
line: I’ve never been so wrong in all my life!

name: Thorin
line: I am sorry I doubted you.

name: Bilbo
line: No, I would have doubted me too. I’m not a hero or a warrior...not even a burglar.

name: Bilbo
line: Is that what I think it is?

name: Gandalf
line: Erebor—The Lonely Mountain. The last of the great dwarf kingdoms of Middleearth.

name: Thorin
line: Our home.

name: Oin
line: A raven! The birds are returning to the mountain.

name: Gandalf
line: That, my dear Oin, is a thrush.

name: Thorin
line: But we’ll take it as a sign a good omen.

name: Bilbo
line: You’re right. I do believe the worst is behind us.
